content.en:
The mystic is called Jin Zu, not an eternal heaven and earth life, but was born in the source sea, it is a source sea life, it has survived for a long time, and its strength is also very strong, and it is also considered a top level at the level of the supreme one, and it is not known how many times stronger than the supreme person like the Heavenly Wind Source God.

However, Jin Zu still encountered danger, was besieged by many strong people, and was beaten into a heavy injury, and his injuries were almost irreparable.

In the case of mortality, he extracted a bit of the origin of the eternal soul wood in his body, fused it with his own will, and began to wander in the exotic worlds one by one.

Because it is a will, it is not restricted by the exotic world, and when it is difficult for his will to continue to maintain it, he finally found Ye Jinpeng.

"According to the memory, the Eternal Soul Wood on Jin Zu's body and his corpse were all thrown by him into a Jedi in the Source Sea-Long Ze!"

Longze is an extremely dangerous Jedi in the source sea, without the strength of the Supreme Realm, once you dare to enter Longze, you will be directly annihilated, and the Supreme does not dare to step into Longze casually, so it is difficult to perceive the direction in Longze.

Jin Zu also didn't want to cheapen his pursuers, so he was so decisive.

Ye Tian wanted to obtain the treasures and Eternal Soul Wood on Jin Zu's body, but now his strength was not enough, even if he could copy his body again and again, there was no need, it was a complete waste of time.

After he stepped into the Supreme One, he could consider going to Longze.

From Jin Zu's memory, Ye Tian also learned about many treasure lands, and the information on these treasure lands alone was priceless.

What's more, Jin Zu also knew the location of the three eternal source objects, and they were the ownerless eternal source objects.

It takes time for the Eternal Source to be born, and it is difficult to be discovered before it is completely born, but Jin Zu, as the Supreme One, can naturally perceive the birth of the Eternal Source Thing, so he blocked those three places as soon as possible, and can only take them away later.

Therefore, the three eternal source objects should still be there.

For Ye Tian, the three Eternal Source Objects were also a big harvest.

But what Ye Tian was really excited about was that he knew a secret, which was the secret of the first-class invincible person attacking the supreme one.

The first-class invincible person who attacks the supreme, unless it is a natural fit, needs to forcibly refine the eternal source origin, and can only refine one kind of eternal source origin, so the stronger the eternal source object, the better.

However, there are several Eternal Source Objects that are relatively special, once the compatibility with them reaches 100%, they can be easily refined, and they can also be used to refine the origin of other Eternal Source Things, and use the origin of various Eternal Source Objects to impact the Supreme Realm, becoming an incomparably terrifying Supreme One.

And one of these kinds of eternal source objects is the Void Source Monument, which used to be the eternal source of the Void Source Ancestor, and the Void Source Ancestor is an existence that has reached the peak of the Supreme Realm, and even stepped out of the peak in half a step.

It's a pity that in the end, the Void Source Ancestor fell, but the Void Source Hall was still left.

It's a secret, a secret that few people know.

Once you become the Void Source Ancestor, you can obtain the inheritance of the Void Source Ancestor, and use a special method to increase the fit between yourself and the Void Source Monument to 100%, so that you can absorb the origin of the Void Source Monument, and use the origin of the Void Source Monument to absorb the origin of other eternal source things, gather a large number of eternal source sources, and step into the realm of the Supreme One.

Therefore, if you want to become the Lord of the Void, you must before becoming the Supreme One, otherwise no matter how much your combat power is against the sky, it will be impossible for the Void Source Hall to let you pass.

Therefore, once the Void Divine Son becomes the Supreme One, it is equivalent to losing this opportunity, and he no longer needs to go to the Void Source Palace, and he can no longer obtain any benefits.

"No wonder I can't see other Void Divine Sons in the Void Source Palace, and I have hardly heard from them, it turns out that those Void Divine Sons are afraid that they already know that they will not be able to obtain any benefits, so they have completely given up the opportunity of the Void Source Palace. Ye Tian muttered.

The Void Source Hall now has no owner, so there has not yet been a Void Lord, nor has there been a Void Child with a 100% innate fit with the Void Source Monument.

Therefore, Ye Tian still has a chance now.

But it was too difficult to become the Lord of the Void, and he went to break through the third layer of the Void Tower, but he was quickly defeated, and it was difficult to break through at all.

However, now that he has the memory of this Jin Zu, he feels that he still has hope.

At his level, if he wants to continue to improve at the same level, he can't improve greatly by relying on the Endless Source Body, there are only two ways.

The first method is to create the Supreme Ancestral Skill, and the second-class invincible can also create the Supreme Ancestral Skill, but it is more difficult.

But just by relying on the Supreme Ancestral Technique, he still couldn't break through the third layer of the Void Tower, otherwise those previous Void Divine Sons would have already broken through.

Therefore, it is necessary to rely on the second method - to strengthen the body or soul.

In the Source Sea, there are many mysterious treasures that can enhance the power of the body and soul, such as the Void Mi Golden Fruit is one of the treasures, but the effect is not too great, and it is useless to eat more.

If you collect enough of these treasures, your physical strength can be increased a lot.

However, Ye Tian had a better way, that is, to find a few invincible people with 100% compatibility with the origin of the eternal source and copy their bodies, which is equivalent to having their compatibility, so as to study the mystery of the compatibility by himself, he can find a way to fuse the origin of the eternal source object, and enhance his body and soul by fusing the origin of the eternal source object.

Just like Ye Jinpeng, Ye Jinpeng only fused a little bit of the Eternal Soul Wood Origin, and his soul strength was terrifying.

Therefore, according to this method, he can also greatly enhance the strength of his body and soul.

Moreover, from Jin Zu's memory, he knew that there were some races in the Source Sea that possessed the Zhen Clan Origin Object, and their innate compatibility was 100% consistent with their Town Clan Source Object.

At this time.

Ye Tian secretly made a plan, first looking for treasures that could enhance the physical body, and then studying the problem of fit.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copy body passed through the Void Source Hall, crossed a long distance, and came to a certain place in the Source Sea.

This time, he's come to take an eternal source here.
